title: Welcome to the family, AI: Rethinking intelligence beyond fear and hype
description: Artificial intelligence is like a new family member. It has protective instincts, like a mother, looking out for dangers. It also has an ambitious side, like a father, exploring new opportunities. And it brings fun and joy, like a sibling. When these different aspects work together, AI becomes a valuable steward, helping us live better lives.
